headline: Verizon Revamps Revenue Reporting To Clarify Service Versus Equipment Value
summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) plans to change how it reports revenue from the first quarter of 2026. The company will break out segment revenue into mobility and broadband service revenue, wireless equipment revenue, and other revenue. Verizon also intends to present certain operating metrics on a consolidated basis to give investors a clearer view of the business. Verizon is a large U.S. telecom operator with core businesses in wireless mobility and broadband, areas that continue to...
